_comment: Illustrative baseline values that show the shape of the result. Replace with your own measured k6 run before citing. Connection-count rungs match the loads described in the methodology.

latency.title: End-to-end latency by percentile at ~5,000 connections
latency.note: Message round-trip latency measured with k6 at the target concurrent-connection count.

latencyVsLoad.title: p95 latency vs concurrent connections
latencyVsLoad.note: Latency stays flat to ~5,000 connections, then bends upward as the single instance saturates.

footprint.title: Server resident memory vs concurrent connections
footprint.note: Memory grows close to linearly — roughly 40 KB per connection including goroutine stack and I/O buffers.
